expression: model grain (brown-rice) BAF/TF matches measured within a factor adequate for dietary risk assessment => support; systematic structural under/over-prediction => refute
finding:
Tang 2026 OOS: PFOA endosperm TF model 0.11 vs measured 0.95 (dw); grain structurally ~3-8x under across congeners; not closable by L_Ph / lipid tuning (docs/tang2026_grain_units_exploration.md).
Kim 2019: grain BAF reproduced only by FORCING L_Ph (0.07 -> 4.43, L_Ph~0.84) as a single-point in-sample anchor; Kim is grain-only, so root/straw TF are unconstrained.
